purpose: Fallback probe rules for fonts not covered by exact basic mappings.

rules.when: The selected font source matches a basic mapping source key.
rules.success_gate: Resolve Text+ SetInput('Font') succeeds and GetInput('Font') reads back the accepted family.

rules.when: The source name contains CJK and direct Resolve/Fusion lookup fails.
generate_candidates: font name table nameID=6 PostScript name
ASCII full name without style suffix
rules.evidence: 1282 verified mappings accepted a PostScript name.
rules.success_gate: Text+ readback font equals candidate and visual render has >=4 glyph segments with tofu_suspect=false.

rules.when: FontManager.AddFont(path, name) succeeds but the CJK display name is not listed as an available family.
generate_candidates: FontManager family resolved from the font file basename
first ASCII family returned by the font name table
first ASCII full name returned by the font name table
rules.evidence: 1526 verified mappings accepted an ASCII family name.
rules.success_gate: Fusion FontManager reports candidate available or Text+ readback changes from previous font.

rules.when: The selected font name includes a style suffix or the font metadata exposes styles.
rules.success_gate: Text+ Font and Style readback match the packed candidate.

rules.when: A local font file path is known but no generated name is in the current Fusion font list.
rules.success_gate: AddFont returns true, then Text+ accepts the resolved FontManager family.

rules.when: The original source name already works directly.
rules.action: Do not count it as a repair rule.
rules.success_gate: direct_before must be false and accepted must differ from source for rule counting.
